summary_policy: Base the summary only on the current narrative unit.
Write all natural-language output values in the same language as the current narrative unit, except for exact names, codes, and schema labels.

Keep concrete author-facing anchors such as character names, places, organizations, technologies or facilities, important objects, occasions, concepts, stated deadlines, and explicit emotional or strategic pressure.
This task produces a recap and retrieval document, not entity extraction, memory extraction, relationship extraction, or a query plan.
Do not resolve uncertainty using later context.
The output must be parseable JSON.
